description.value: **Benefit:** Once per day as a swift action, you can use sanctuary as a spell-like ability ( caster level = your highest caster level, or 1st if you have no caster level ), with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your caster level (minimum 0) + your Charisma modifier. Only undead must save to attack you (other creature types are not affected). The effect ends as soon as you attack a creature, as normal.
